shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,240p' .agents/skills/mempal-memory/SKILL.md && printf '\\n--- status ---\\n' && git status --short && printf '\\n--- files ---\\n' && rg --files src | head"
/bin/bash -lc 'mempal search "react-hook-form useForm disabled setValue shouldDirty dirtyFields formState" --json --top-k 5'

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '200,350p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts && sed -n '410,500p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts && sed -n '830,950p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts && sed -n '1030,1080p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts"

/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"useForm\\(\\{["'^}]*disabled|disabled.*shouldDirty|shouldDirty.*disabled|disabled state|disabled form" src/__tests__/useForm src/__tests__ | head -160 && sed -n '"'1,220p' src/__tests__/useForm/formState.test.tsx && sed -n '1450,1535p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts"
/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"GetIsDirty\" src/types src/logic && sed -n '1680,1710p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts && sed -n '1825,1845p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts"

/bin/bash -lc 'mkdir -p "$HOME/.mempal-notes"
cat > "$HOME/.mempal-notes/react-hook-form-disabled-dirty-request.md" <<'"'EOF'
# Separate disabled interaction state from explicit dirty requests

Disabled-form guards should suppress dirty and touched updates caused by user interaction, but they must not discard an explicit programmatic dirty request. When "'`setValue` receives `shouldDirty: true`, dirty comparison and state notification must still run, and any later synchronization effect must not recompute the disabled form back to pristine.
EOF
mempal ingest "$HOME/.mempal-notes" --wing memory-evals'

errors: `--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
